endpoints.name: Get information about a station near a location
endpoints.description: Get information about a station near a location
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LON}} with a real lon. Replace {{LAT}} with a real lat.

endpoints.name: Get stations in a given radius
endpoints.description: Get stations in a given radius
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DIST}} with a real dist. Replace {{LON}} with a real lon. Replace {{LAT}} with a real lat.

endpoints.name: Get information about a specific station
endpoints.description: Get information about a specific station
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.
